# WebWaka OS — Verticals Execution Prompts: Set J (Missing Verticals)

**Document type:** Agent execution prompt set
**Scope:** 28 verticals identified as missing from Sets A–I — gap analysis against `infra/db/seeds/0004_verticals-master.csv`
**Repo:** https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os
**Branch base:** `main`
**Milestone targets:** M9–M12
**Status:** Ready for agent execution
**Generated by:** Gap analysis — `docs/execution-prompts/UNIMPLEMENTED_TASKS.md`

---

> **3-in-1 Platform Note:**
> Verticals in this set span Commerce, Transport, Professional, Civic, Health, and Education.
> **SuperAgent AI is cross-cutting — NOT a fourth pillar.**
> **Critical AI governance for this set:**
> - Orphanage / child care: **L3 HITL — absolute. No child PII ever to AI (P13 hardest rule).**
> - Optician / eye clinic: clinical-adjacent — **L2 maximum for scheduling; L3 HITL for any clinical output**
> - Okada/Keke co-op: state bans and NURTW compliance — L2 max
> - Land surveyor: legal/registry adjacent — L2 max; no parcel identity data to AI (P13)
> - Government school: institutional — L2 max; student ref IDs opaque
> - All transactions in integer kobo (P9); no floats anywhere
> - NDPR consent before any AI feature (P10); USSD excluded from AI advisory (P12)

### General rules for all agents using these prompts

- Never make assumptions about WebWaka's architecture. Always read the referenced documents and code first.
- All monetary values in integer kobo (P9) — no exceptions.
- No cross-tenant data leakage (T3). Every D1 query scopes to `tenant_id`.
- Research deeply — verify NCC, DPR, MDCN, FRSC, SON, NAFDAC, and other regulatory requirements online before implementing any FSM gate.
- Check `infra/db/migrations/` for the next available migration number before creating any migration.

## COMMERCE VERTICALS — P2

---

## TASK V-COMM-J1: Hotel / Guesthouse / Shortlet Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `hotel`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Nigeria's hospitality sector is one of the fastest-growing in Africa; Lagos shortlet boom, Abuja hotel corridor, Lekki Phase 1 serviced apartments; NIHOTOUR licensing and state tourism board registration
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:**
  - Verticals master plan: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md
  - 3-in-1 platform architecture: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md
  - Verticals FSM engine: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals/src/
  - Platform invariants: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/platform-invariants.md
  - Entitlement model: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/entitlement-model.md
  - AI integration framework: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md
  - SuperAgent product spec: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/superagent/02-product-spec.md

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in hospitality and property management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian hospitality sector — NIHOTOUR (National Institute for Hospitality and Tourism) licensing, state tourism board registration (LSHATAB in Lagos, FCT Tourism Development Department in Abuja), NIHOTOUR star rating system, short-let apartment market (Airbnb-style domestic operators), hotel room booking pipeline, reservation calendar, room type management, occupancy tracking, revenue per available room (RevPAR) in kobo.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading (100% before execution):**

- `docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md` — Commerce verticals; entry for `hotel`
- `docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md`
- `docs/governance/platform-invariants.md` — P2, P9, P10, P12, P13, T3, T4
- `infra/db/seeds/0004_verticals-master.csv` — row for `hotel`
- `packages/verticals/src/` — FSM engine; `packages/auth/src/guards.ts`
- `docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md`; `infra/db/migrations/` — next migration number

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian hotel and shortlet market — Lagos shortlet density (Victoria Island, Lekki), Abuja hotel corridor (Wuse, Maitama), average nightly rate range (₦15,000–₦500,000), occupancy rates, OTA competition (Booking.com, Airbnb penetration vs local WhatsApp-first operators); competitors: no dominant Nigerian hotel PMS; Opera (Oracle Hospitality), Mews, local Excel-based management; key regulatory bodies: NIHOTOUR, state tourism boards, FIRS hotel levy.

Execution plan:
- **Objective:** Give Nigerian hotels, guesthouses, and shortlet operators a digital room management, booking pipeline, occupancy calendar, and revenue tracking system — fully kobo-denominated
- **Schema:**
  - `hotel_profiles` — hotel_name, NIHOTOUR_licence, state_tourism_reg, CAC_RC, star_rating INTEGER (1–5), property_type (hotel/guesthouse/shortlet/serviced_apt), workspace_id, tenant_id, status
  - `hotel_rooms` — room_number TEXT, room_type (standard/deluxe/suite/shortlet_unit), capacity_guests INTEGER, nightly_rate_kobo, status (available/occupied/maintenance), tenant_id
  - `hotel_bookings` — guest_ref_id TEXT (opaque), room_id, check_in INTEGER, check_out INTEGER, nights INTEGER, total_kobo, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo, booking_channel (direct/ota/walk_in), status (reserved/checked_in/checked_out/cancelled/no_show), tenant_id
  - `hotel_revenue` — booking_date INTEGER, room_id, revenue_kobo, channel, tenant_id
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nihotour_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `VENUE_UTILIZATION_REPORT` (occupancy rate by room type and season), `SALES_FORECAST` (RevPAR trend) — L2; Pro plan; aggregate occupancy rates and revenue by room category only — no guest_ref_id (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for booking deposits; Tier 3 for OTA partnership and foreign guest billing above ₦500,000

---

**3. Implementation workflow:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-hotel` from `main`. `registerHotelVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Nights as integer. All monetary in kobo (P9). Guest_ref_id opaque UUID. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded from AI (P12). Double-booking conflict check required at route level (same room, overlapping dates must reject with typed error).

---

**4. QA and verification:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-hotel/src/hotel.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `nihotour_verified`; room with integer nightly_rate_kobo; booking with integer total_kobo, deposit_kobo, nights; occupancy calendar; AI occupancy report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only). Negative: double-booking same room overlapping dates → blocked (conflict check test); fractional kobo → rejected; cross-tenant → 403; AI with guest_ref_id → P13 blocked; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM → typed error. Security: unauth → 401; KYC tier 403.

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Finalize and push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/hotel): Hotel/Guesthouse/Shortlet vertical — room management, booking pipeline, NIHOTOUR, AI RevPAR (M9)"
git push origin feat/vertical-hotel
```
PR checklist: double-booking conflict test, NIHOTOUR gate, integer nights + kobo, P13 guest exclusion, standard checks.

- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Nigeria's furniture manufacturing sector is centred in Lagos (Ojota, Badagry Expressway), Aba, and Kano; mass market to luxury bespoke furniture; SON (Standards Organisation of Nigeria) timber certification, LCCI chamber membership
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)

- **GitHub context:** (standard links as above)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in manufacturing and artisan workshop management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian furniture manufacturing — SON timber grading standards, LCCI (Lagos Chamber of Commerce and Industry) membership, custom order management (measurements, materials, finish), production stage tracking, delivery schedule, material costing in kobo.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: order management (client_ref_id opaque, furniture_type: chair/table/wardrobe/sofa/bed/custom, material: mahogany/sapele/plywood/MDF, quantity INTEGER, unit_price_kobo, total_kobo, status), production stage tracking (design/cutting/assembly/finishing/quality_check/ready/delivered), material inventory (material_name, unit, quantity_in_stock INTEGER, cost_per_unit_kobo, reorder_level INTEGER), delivery log.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `furniture_maker_profiles` (business_name, SON_registration, LCCI_membership, CAC_RC, workshop_type (mass_market/bespoke/export), workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `furniture_orders` (client_ref_id TEXT, furniture_type, material, quantity INTEGER, unit_price_kobo, total_kobo, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo, production_stage, delivery_date INTEGER, status, tenant_id); `furniture_materials` (material_name, unit, quantity_in_stock INTEGER, cost_per_unit_kobo, reorder_level INTEGER, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `cac_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `INVENTORY_REORDER_ALERT` (low stock materials), `SALES_FORECAST` (order pipeline revenue) — L1–L2; Growth plan; aggregate order counts and revenue by furniture type — no client_ref_id (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for standard orders; Tier 2 for export furniture contracts above ₦2M

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-furniture-maker`. `registerFurnitureMakerVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Quantities as integers. Kobo (P9). Client_ref_id opaque. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

QA:** Register; FSM to `cac_verified`; order with integer quantity, unit_price_kobo, total_kobo; production stage progression; material inventory with integer quantity_in_stock, cost_per_unit_kobo; reorder alert AI trigger; AI sales forecast with aiRights + NDPR; client details in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. ## TASK V-COMM-J3: Gas / LPG Distributor Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `gas-distributor`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — LPG (cooking gas) distribution is safety-critical and DPR/NUPRC-regulated; Nigeria has millions of LPG cylinder users; Lagos, Abuja, Kano gas distribution networks; cylinder refill tracking, safety compliance
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in LPG distribution management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian LPG sector — DPR/NUPRC (Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission) dealer licence, LPGASSOC (LPG Association of Nigeria) membership, SON-certified cylinder standards, cylinder refill weight tracking (integer grams to avoid float), safety compliance records, delivery route management, bulk vs retail pricing in kobo.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents. Gas weights must be stored as integer grams — NEVER as float kilograms.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: cylinder inventory (cylinder_size_grams INTEGER: 3000/5000/12500/25000/50000, stock_count INTEGER, refill_price_kobo), customer orders (customer_ref_id opaque, cylinder_size_grams, quantity INTEGER, total_kobo, delivery_date INTEGER, status), delivery tracking, bulk customer pricing (corporate_rate_kobo vs retail_rate_kobo), DPR compliance log, safety inspection record.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `gas_distributor_profiles` (business_name, DPR_dealer_licence, NUPRC_ref, LPGASSOC_membership, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `gas_inventory` (cylinder_size_grams INTEGER, stock_count INTEGER, refill_price_kobo, bulk_price_kobo, tenant_id); `gas_orders` (customer_ref_id TEXT, cylinder_size_grams INTEGER, quantity INTEGER, unit_price_kobo, total_kobo, order_date INTEGER, delivery_date INTEGER, status (pending/confirmed/delivered/returned), tenant_id); `gas_safety_log` (inspection_date INTEGER, inspector_ref TEXT, cylinders_inspected INTEGER, passed BOOLEAN, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `dpr_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `INVENTORY_REORDER_ALERT` (cylinder stock levels), `CASH_FLOW_FORECAST` (delivery revenue) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate stock counts and revenue by cylinder size — no customer_ref_id (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for delivery billing; Tier 3 for bulk LPG procurement above ₦5M

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-gas-distributor`. `registerGasDistributorVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. Cylinder sizes as integer grams (no float kg). Quantities as integers. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `dpr_verified`; inventory with integer cylinder_size_grams, stock_count, refill_price_kobo; order with integer quantity, total_kobo; safety log; AI stock alert with aiRights + NDPR; float cylinder size rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/gas-distributor): Gas/LPG Distributor vertical — cylinder inventory (integer grams), DPR, AI stock alert (M10)"`. PR checklist: integer grams (no float kg), DPR gate, standard checks.

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in pharmacy chain management and healthcare retail software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian pharmacy chain sector — PCN (Pharmaceutical Council of Nigeria) multi-outlet licence, NAFDAC drug import and distribution clearance, DPS (Drugs and Poisons Schedule) classification, prescription record management (prescription_ref — opaque, never patient name), stock management across branches, cold chain compliance for refrigerated drugs, controlled substance dispensing log (Schedule 1–3 drugs require special audit trail). All drug prices in integer kobo.

- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `pcn_verified` → `nafdac_cleared` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `INVENTORY_REORDER_ALERT` (low stock by drug category), `COLD_CHAIN_ANOMALY` (cold chain breach alert) — L2; Pro plan; aggregate stock levels and sales by drug category — no prescription_ref, patient data, or drug-specific quantities for controlled substances (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for standard dispensing; Tier 3 for controlled substance management and import operations

- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Distinct from `laundry` (P2 dry cleaner); this is the self-service and coin-operated laundromat model growing in Lagos, Abuja university areas; machine management, time-slot booking, wash cycles as integer minutes

- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in laundromat and self-service laundry management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian self-service laundry sector — Lagos/Abuja growth corridor; machine slot booking, per-cycle pricing in kobo, wash_duration_minutes as integer, detergent add-on pricing, monthly membership model, machine utilisation tracking.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: machine management (machine_name, machine_type: washer/dryer/combo, capacity_kg INTEGER, cycle_price_kobo, wash_duration_minutes INTEGER, status), slot booking (customer_ref_id opaque, machine_id, slot_start INTEGER, wash_duration_minutes INTEGER, cycle_price_kobo, add_ons JSON, total_kobo, status), membership (customer_ref_id, plan_name, monthly_fee_kobo, cycles_included INTEGER, cycles_used INTEGER).

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `laundry_service_profiles` (business_name, CAC_RC, location TEXT, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `laundry_machines` (machine_name, machine_type, capacity_kg INTEGER, cycle_price_kobo, wash_duration_minutes INTEGER, status (available/in_use/maintenance), tenant_id); `laundry_bookings` (customer_ref_id TEXT, machine_id, slot_start INTEGER, wash_duration_minutes INTEGER, cycle_price_kobo, total_kobo, status (booked/in_use/completed/cancelled), tenant_id); `laundry_memberships` (customer_ref_id TEXT, plan_name, monthly_fee_kobo, cycles_included INTEGER, cycles_used INTEGER, renewal_date INTEGER, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `cac_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `VENUE_UTILIZATION_REPORT` (machine utilisation by hour of day) — L1–L2; Growth plan; aggregate booking counts and revenue — no customer_ref_id (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for standard slot bookings and memberships

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-laundry-service`. `registerLaundryServiceVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. Capacity and duration as integers. Kobo (P9). ---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `cac_verified`; machine with integer capacity_kg, cycle_price_kobo, wash_duration_minutes; booking with integer slot_start, total_kobo; double-booking same machine overlapping → rejected; membership with integer monthly_fee_kobo, cycles_included; AI utilisation report with aiRights + NDPR; customer_ref_id in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in oil and gas services business management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian oil and gas service sector — NCDMB (Nigerian Content Development and Monitoring Board) local content certificate, DPR/NUPRC operator registration, NAPIMS (National Petroleum Investment Management Services) vendor prequalification awareness, HSE (Health Safety Environment) compliance log, large contract values in kobo (integer, may reach trillions — ensure INTEGER column is used, not REAL), milestone billing, client_ref_id opaque.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents. Contract values in this vertical may reach billions of naira (hundreds of billions of kobo) — ensure D1 INTEGER columns are used (SQLite INTEGER is 64-bit, can hold up to 9.2 × 10^18 — sufficient). NEVER use REAL/FLOAT columns for any monetary value.

---

Key features: contract management (client_ref_id opaque, contract_type: engineering/procurement/construction/maintenance/consultancy, contract_value_kobo, start_date INTEGER, end_date INTEGER, milestones JSON, status), HSE compliance log (inspection_date INTEGER, inspector_ref TEXT, incident_count INTEGER, outcome: compliant/non_compliant), NCDMB report (report_period TEXT, local_content_pct_x100 INTEGER — ×100 to avoid float, filed BOOLEAN), vendor prequalification reference (napims_ref TEXT — opaque).

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `oil_gas_service_profiles` (company_name, NCDMB_cert TEXT, DPR_licence TEXT, NAPIMS_vendor_ref TEXT, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `oil_contracts` (client_ref_id TEXT, contract_type, contract_value_kobo, mobilisation_fee_kobo, start_date INTEGER, end_date INTEGER, milestones JSON, status (prequalification/awarded/mobilisation/active/completed/terminated), tenant_id); `oil_hse_log` (inspection_date INTEGER, inspector_ref TEXT, incident_count INTEGER, outcome TEXT, tenant_id); `oil_ncdmb_reports` (report_period TEXT, local_content_pct_x100 INTEGER, filed BOOLEAN, filed_date INTEGER, tenant_id)

- **SuperAgent:** `BILLING_FORECAST` (contract milestone revenue pipeline) — L2; Pro plan; aggregate contract values and milestone counts by contract type — no client_ref_id or NAPIMS ref (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
